authority_profile_short: Curated incident database with strong discovery and comparison value, but not a final authority for legal status or allegation truth.
access_method_short: Public cite pages, public snapshot surfaces, and bounded route inspection.
allowed_use_now: Comparator metadata, overlap checks, and source-baseline discussion.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not treat as final authority on allegation truth, legal status, or completeness.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Verify one snapshot manifest or single-record machine-readable extraction that ties public page labels to field names without broad harvesting.
dashboard_hook: Source-family saturation map; comparator-overlap panel; interoperability readiness board.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for overlap, residual-gap detection, and source-baseline discussion; weak alone for legal/compliance or incident-truth claims.

authority_profile_short: Official institutional monitor with strong policy-facing authority for incident indexing and controlled vocabularies, but not itself a final authority on underlying allegations.
access_method_short: Public incident pages and unauthenticated JSON facet endpoints under the OECD incidents service.
allowed_use_now: Comparator metadata, overlap checks, and source-baseline discussion.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not treat as final authority on allegation truth, legal status, or completeness.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Trace one public detail page back to a stable list/discovery route and document the minimal safe metadata subset.
dashboard_hook: Country/language coverage comparison; vocabulary bridge; incident-monitor interoperability board.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for comparator metadata, vocabulary bridges, and country/language context; still insufficient alone for strong factual or legal claims.

authority_profile_short: High structured technical authority for public AI vulnerability/report metadata when exact IDs and references are preserved.
access_method_short: Public website plus openly downloadable GitHub raw JSON and repository contents.
allowed_use_now: Use exact IDs/references for direct security joins and interoperability appendices.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not collapse placeholder/context rows into solved joins or complete incident counts.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Treat the current AVID appendix as the reviewer-safe control surface; only add a third canonical direct join outside the current Langflow-plus-ToolHive pair or an exact negative-match rule if justified, otherwise return effort to sf08/sf09 authority hardening.
dashboard_hook: Security-edge-case bridge; direct-versus-placeholder join panel; reviewer-safe interoperability appendix.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for technical mechanism, vulnerability metadata, and two exact security-row bridges; weak for general incident census or treating placeholder rows as solved joins.

authority_profile_short: High structured authority for adversarial-ML and agentic-security techniques, mitigations, and case-study relations.
access_method_short: Public website plus Apache-licensed GitHub YAML/data distribution.
allowed_use_now: Use technique and mitigation context for security crosswalks and figure overlays.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not claim ATLAS case-study equivalence where only technique context exists.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Treat the current ATLAS appendix as the reviewer-safe control surface; only add a defensible exact case-study ID or stronger independent anchor for cautious rows if justified, otherwise return effort to sf08/sf09 authority hardening.
dashboard_hook: Security/agentic crosswalk; technique-coverage heatmap; case-context-versus-cautious-context panel.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for security-technique structure, mitigation framing, and operational technique-context joins; weak for non-security completeness or direct case-study equivalence claims.

authority_profile_short: Secondary but important structured authority for risk and harm definitions; not an incident-truth source.
allowed_use_now: Use as taxonomy/definition support and methods framing.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not use as event evidence.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Extract one compact manual risk-category bridge for the most used LIMEN harm labels before any stronger comparative language.
dashboard_hook: Taxonomy heatmap; residual-category overlay; methods table on definition-layer comparators.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for methods, taxonomy, and harm-definition claims; invalid as event evidence.

authority_profile_short: Secondary conceptual authority for harm framing and related-work comparison, but not machine-ready incident evidence.
access_method_short: Public Georgetown CSET article surface plus exact public PDF/README anchors captured in local bridge work.
allowed_use_now: Use as appendix-only manual harm overlay and related-work support.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not present as ingest-ready row-level evidence.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Keep the family explicitly outside machine-ingest claims and add a second low-drift reviewer pass before any row-level posture aggregate is exposed.
dashboard_hook: Harm-taxonomy note; conceptual-support panel; related-work table; Route-A appendix-only methods note.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for appendix-only harm-posture interpretation and related-work positioning; invalid as event evidence or ingest-ready comparator.

authority_profile_short: High authority for official actions, allegations, orders, fines, guidance, and procedural posture within issuing jurisdiction.
access_method_short: Official regulator portals, enforcement pages, press releases, decisions, and linked official documents.
allowed_use_now: Use for official actions, orders, procedural posture, and authority upgrading.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not generalize beyond the issuing authority text or jurisdictional scope.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Add one non-U.S./non-UK follow-through row tied to a public record or court-facing document to reduce current geography concentration, while keeping the court-family bottleneck on exact sf08 depth separate.
dashboard_hook: Authority-weighted evidence matrix; regulator-action timeline; jurisdiction map.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Best current family for upgrading weak media or company claims into paper-grade bounded statements.

authority_profile_short: Highest authority for filings, judgments, consent decrees, and procedural posture when records are official and public.
access_method_short: Public court databases, judgment portals, tribunal repositories, or official DOJ/agency-linked docket materials.
allowed_use_now: Use for complaints, judgments, decrees, filings, and court-grade posture.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not infer court text where only agency summaries or partial OCR exist.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Either capture one open complaint, consent decree, docket entry, or judicial order text for the iTutorGroup row from a genuinely different public court-facing surface or clearly labeled open mirror, or use a materially different OCR stack / another public exact-caption source before retrying the Nate suffix.
dashboard_hook: Regulator-to-court escalation matrix; procedural-posture timeline; Route-B blocker panel.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Critical for hostile-reviewer resilience where regulator or agency summaries alone are too thin.

authority_profile_short: Medium-to-high authority for what a public body disclosed or procured; weak for deployment impact, legality, or efficacy unless corroborated.
access_method_short: Official registers, procurement portals, tender notices, award pages, contract pages, and public-body project pages.
allowed_use_now: Use for disclosed register/procurement/project-page facts and heterogeneity comparisons.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not infer capability, legality, impact, or exact buyer-side linkage beyond the cited record.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Add one buyer-side tender, award, contract, or public impact-assessment companion for either register row, or keep the family bounded at register-plus-non-register disclosure surfaces.
dashboard_hook: Jurisdiction/language map; disclosure-field completeness chart; register-versus-project-page-versus-regulator panel; Route-B blocker panel.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for disclosure-surface heterogeneity and public-body-existence claims; still weak for buyer-side traceability, capability, legality, or impact claims.

authority_profile_short: Primary only for what the issuer disclosed; self-interested and incomplete for broader truth claims.
access_method_short: Public status pages, transparency reports, release notes, product incident notes, GitHub advisories/issues.
allowed_use_now: Use for issuer timing, remediation signals, and disclosure chronology.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not rely on issuer notices alone for full incident characterization.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Verify missing direct vendor remediation details for Langflow and CrewAI while preserving the advisory-vs-issue distinction.
dashboard_hook: Remediation timeline overlay; issuer-vs-independent-source comparison table.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Useful for timing and remediation claims; should rarely stand alone for incident characterization.

authority_profile_short: Variable authority; strongest when tied to CERTs, established labs, coordinated disclosure, or peer-reviewed work.
access_method_short: Public blogs, conference papers, CERT notes, vendor advisories, and coordinated-disclosure pages.
allowed_use_now: Use for mechanism discovery, coordination posture, remediation visibility, and bounded security comparisons.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not convert mixed-authority rows into prevalence or complete-remediation claims, and do not overread the retired supply-chain/plugin zero state into broad trust-boundary coverage.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Close `GAP-peer_reviewed_security_case_support` first; after that, treat Langflow exact-vendor-remediation notice depth as the fastest same-row hardening move and keep LIMEN-000012 explicitly singleton-only until a second exemplar or stronger independent attachment appears.
dashboard_hook: Security-source authority matrix; advisory-to-CVE linkage graph; remediation-visibility overlay; Route-B security hardening panel.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Useful for mechanism discovery, source-independence comparison, coordination posture, and remediation-visibility comparisons when vendor/CERT/release-note/independent-lab roles stay explicit; still weak for prevalence or complete remediation claims, with one remaining peer-reviewed gap and singleton-only trust-boundary breadth.

authority_profile_short: Secondary corroborative authority valuable for discovery, local context, and timeline stitching, but weaker than official sources.
access_method_short: Public news sites, investigative outlets, archives, and broadcaster pages.
allowed_use_now: Use for discovery, local context, language coverage, and source-resolution funnels.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not make strong legal or normative claims from media alone.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Resolve one additional direct source from Finland, Lithuania, or Estonia and record whether the stronger authority comes from broadcaster, police, court, or agency sources.
dashboard_hook: Jurisdiction/language map; lead-to-authority upgrade funnel; rare-language methods note.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for discovery, coverage-gap analysis, and rare-language methods; still weak alone for strong legal or normative claims.

authority_profile_short: Medium-to-high authority for retractions, correction notices, benchmark-integrity notes, and scholarly dispute records depending on source.
access_method_short: Public journal notices, publisher pages, DOI registries, retraction databases, and institutional reports.
allowed_use_now: Use for notice depth, retraction/correction surfaces, and limitations discussion.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not infer editorial reasoning where direct notice text is absent.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Probe one blocked or mediated row for direct publisher notice text while preserving the four current family-depth classes and keeping weak specialist/platform-gated rows explicitly below direct-notice grade.
dashboard_hook: Research-integrity dashboard facet; publisher-notice upgrade funnel; scholarly-integrity timeline; Route-A limitations panel.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Strong for bounded claims about article identification, retraction/correction surfaces, publisher-notice depth, and source-resolution friction; weaker for editorial reasoning where direct notice text is blocked or absent.

authority_profile_short: Low authority alone; discovery surface only until independently corroborated.
access_method_short: Public posts, forums, community trackers, screenshots, issue threads, and public discussion surfaces.
allowed_use_now: Use only through the implemented corroboration-first lead queue while rows remain below seeded use.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not treat as evidence without an upgrade path.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Populate at most one governed queue row with an exact public anchor and higher-authority corroboration target before any broader family expansion.
dashboard_hook: Lead queue; corroboration backlog; source-upgrade funnel.
paper_or_thesis_use_now: Useful only for discovery until upgraded.

authority_profile_short: Usually low formal authority but valuable for taxonomy stress tests and novelty-boundary cases.
access_method_short: Public contests, art/culture coverage, satire clarifications, showcases, and local anomaly reporting.
allowed_use_now: Use only through the implemented residual-frontier queue while rows remain below seeded use.
blocked_or_not_yet_safe: Do not reward sensational or low-authority anomalies as paper-grade evidence.
smallest_upgrade_trigger: Populate at most one governed residual queue row with explicit inclusion, exclusion, authority-band, and seeded-use-decision fields before any broader family expansion.
